final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original 3×3 nine-grid poster for Xiaohongshu (小红书), formatted as a single vertical image that can be cut into 9 individual square cards after export.

Style/medium: needs a clean, elevated, ins-style healing aesthetic with light quasi-material illustration accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a strict 3-column × 3-row nine-grid layout; each cell is a self-contained card with clear borders or visible gutters between cells; all content centered within each cell, never crossing or touching the grid lines; the full image proportions are 3:4 vertical
Subject: must include all 9 grid cells with the following content:

  格1（封面）: 大标题「让你倒头就睡的8个 tips」，副标题「失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏」，配图元素：柔软床铺、月亮、枕头、眼罩，封面最吸睛，标题突出
  格2: 标题「1. 睡前1小时别玩手机」，正文「蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。」，配图元素：手机、月亮、困倦表情小插画
  格3: 标题「2. 睡前把灯光调暗」，正文「暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。」，配图元素：床头灯、暖黄色灯光、窗帘
  格4: 标题「3. 房间温度别太高」，正文「稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。」，配图元素：空调、温度计、被子
  格5: 标题「4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡」，正文「咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。」，配图元素：咖啡杯、茶杯、禁止符号
  格6: 标题「5. 睡前洗个热水澡」，正文「能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。」，配图元素：浴室蒸汽、毛巾、热水
  格7: 标题「6. 脑子停不下来就写下来」，正文「把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。」，配图元素：笔记本、钢笔、小台灯
  格8: 标题「7. 固定上床时间」，正文「每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。」，配图元素：时钟、月亮、床
  格9: 标题「8. 试试深呼吸放松法」，正文「吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。」，底部小字「收藏这组，今晚试试看」，配图元素：呼吸线条、闭眼人物、星星

Scene/backdrop: each cell has its own soft illustrated backdrop consistent with the sleep-healing theme; overall backdrop palette is cream white / light beige / oat / light caramel
Lighting/mood: needs a gentle, healing, sleep-therapy atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: must use 奶油白、浅米色、淡燕麦色、浅焦糖色 as dominant tones with small accents of deep brown for text; overall palette is soft and feminine
Materials/textures: needs a light quasi-material illustration texture with clean flat layout — exact surface weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text exactly as specified per cell above; must include「让你倒头就睡的8个 tips」「失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏」「收藏这组，今晚试试看」verbatim; all body text and titles verbatim as listed
Constraints: must preserve strict 3×3 grid structure with visible gutters or thin borders for clean cutting; all text must be Chinese only, no English, no garbled characters; every cell must be independently readable after cropping; text must be large, legible, and never placed near grid cut lines; overall layout must feel like a publishable new-media editorial graphic
Avoid: must avoid cheap marketing feel, excessive decoration, English text, garbled characters, text bleeding across grid lines, content that cannot stand alone after cropping
